title: Iran provides loyal voices with internet access while the public faces a record internet blackout

comments.body:
The video of her speech when she was asked about Internet blackout: [https://x.com/PasKoocheh/status/2031306253419339917](https://x.com/PasKoocheh/status/2031306253419339917)

“Regarding the internet, efforts have been made to provide facilities \[the Internet access\] especially for people who can amplify the message and make their voices heard more widely.”

Went down a rabbit hole reading about Iran International. Saudi government funded with a pro-Saudi editorial slant. Doesn't mean they're completely useless I suppose, but not sure I'd take their word on much. Apparently union busting among their employees too, which is a bad look.

Not that I have any love for the Iranian regime but I can't say I prefer the Saudis to be honest.

replies.body: I’ve already posted a comment linking to her actual video, and I’m sure there are plenty of tools you can use to translate it into your language.

comments.body: Whereas our Slopaganda is advanced algorithm manipulating and press conferences.
